title: Intelligento's hat
description: Adds the hat intelligento wears as an in game hat
body:
This mod adds intelligento's hat into minecraft via mod.
The mod also adds crafting recipes and cloth

![Crafting recipe for cloth (should replace wool crafting recipe)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/080888d87004864c748d96323415694c701eb745.png)
![New recipe for wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d5ed0fbc79391324c3055a5afac26d03f3792d7.png)

You can craft or trade for the hat in game

![recipe for the hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6fda1e54b3aa5fa6a31f6411c062eb2fc44f462.png)

The hat should be somewhere in between a diamond helmat and a netherite helmat and be enchantable.
Report bugs on the intelligento inc discord server
